{{CargoOrgan
|name=Trickster's Intestine
|type=Common
|rank=blue
|id=10824
|idx=25
|description="Stratagem No. 7: Three Demons, One Feast! A strategist Traveler disguised as a top chef cooked a dish of Intestine. The poisoned meal sent all three demon gods into months of agonizing illness…" — Thirty-Six Stratagems of the Otherworld
|skill=
|hp=760
|def=146
|atk=111
|rush=84
|gene1=Snail Arena, Total Power Checks -2%
|gene2=In explorations, B-tads gained +2.5%
|gene3=The Pond has a +3% chance to produce W-tads
|gene7=In explorations, B-tads gained +2.5% (Awakened)
|}}
